description:
The Laser component creates a simple red laser when attached that raycasts the enviroment.

When added to a slot the Laser component creates a MeshRenderer, a SegmentMesh, a RayDriver, and a red PBS RimMetallic.

fields._material: The material to use for the laser.
fields._rayDriver: The ray driver driving the generated segment mesh.
fields._meshRenderer: The mesh renderer rendering the segment mesh for this laser pointer type component.
